allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Where-Object {$_Status -eq ''Up''} | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status")
Bash(powershell -Command "Disable-NetAdapter -Name ''TunnelBear Adapter V9'' -Confirm:$false; Disable-NetAdapter -Name ''TAP-Windows Adapter V9'' -Confirm:$false; Write-Host ''done''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetAdapter | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, ifIndex")
